########################################################################
# Include python install macros
########################################################################
include(GrPython)
if(NOT PYTHONINTERP_FOUND)
    return()
endif()

add_subdirectory(bindings)

########################################################################
# Install python sources
########################################################################
gr_python_install(FILES __init__.py
    baseband_channel_receiver.py
    configuration.py
    parameters.py DESTINATION ${GR_PYTHON_DIR}/gnuradio/wisun)

########################################################################
# Handle the unit tests
########################################################################
include(GrTest)

set(GR_TEST_TARGET_DEPS gnuradio-wisun)

# Create a package directory that tests can import. It includes everything
# from `python/`.
add_custom_target(
    copy_module_for_tests ALL
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
            ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/test_modules/gnuradio/wisun/)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_correlate_sync_word_bb ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_correlate_sync_word_bb.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_packet_data_gate_bb ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_packet_data_gate_bb.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_data_whitening_bb ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_data_whitening_bb.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_pdu_add_pcap_header ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_pdu_add_pcap_header.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_rssi_tag_cc ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_rssi_tag_cc.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_power_squelch_relative_cc ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_power_squelch_relative_cc.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_tag_based_dc_correction_ff ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_tag_based_dc_correction_ff.py)
GR_ADD_TEST(qa_pdu_add_pcapng_header ${PYTHON_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/qa_pdu_add_pcapng_header.py)
